summary: Backend-only testing complete for iteration 108 new features. All 19 pytest tests passed. Verified: (1) GET /api/dashboard/semaforo returns traffic light status with correct structure, (2) GET /api/dashboard/stats still works, (3) PDF generation with payment schedule does not crash, (4) PUT /api/company/settings works with empty email/pec fields after EmailStr fix, (5) POST /api/preventivi creates preventivo with explicit payload.

dashboard_semaforo.GET /api/dashboard/semaforo: PASS - Returns 200 with items, counts (green/yellow/red), total

dashboard_stats.GET /api/dashboard/stats: PASS - Returns 200 with all expected fields
dashboard_stats.field_types: PASS - ferro_kg, distinte_attive, cantieri_attivi, pos_mese, fatturato_mese numeric

company_settings_email_fix.empty_email_save: PASS - Can save with email='' and pec=''
company_settings_email_fix.null_email_save: PASS - Can save with email=null and pec=null

preventivi_crud.POST /api/preventivi/: PASS - Creates preventivo with explicit payload (no ...form spread)
preventivi_crud.GET /api/preventivi/{id}: PASS - Returns created preventivo with correct data

preventivo_pdf.with_payment_schedule: PASS - PDF generated with payment_type_id containing 30/60/90 schedule

seed_data_creation: Created test payment_type (pt_6c9ae5abcebe) and preventivo (prev_80a3c45e30) for PDF schedule testing, all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features working: (1) dashboard/semaforo endpoint at routes/dashboard.py:404 returns green/yellow/red traffic light for commesse based on deadline proximity, (2) preventivo PDF generation at routes/preventivi.py:1156 includes payment schedule calculation when payment_type_id is provided, (3) CompanySettingsUpdate model at models/company.py:129 has validator that converts empty strings to None for email/pec fields. Bank details in PDF now use preventivo-specific banca/iban fields with fallback to company default.
